hero.headline: DFW's Highest Trained Pool Experts
hero.subheadline: For 20+ years, Crystal Clear Custom Pools has delivered certified, insured pool care across Ellis and Southern Dallas Counties. Our owner literally teaches the certifications other companies wish they had.
checkmarks: One of only 2 CBP Instructors in all of Texas

services.headline: Complete Pool & Spa Solutions
services.subtitle: From weekly maintenance to full renovations, our certified technicians handle every aspect of pool care with industry-leading expertise.

cards.title: Pool Service & Maintenance
cards.description: Comprehensive weekly cleaning and chemical balancing by knowledgeable professionals who keep your pool operating effectively and efficiently year-round.

cards.title: Equipment Repair & Replacement
cards.description: Expert diagnosis and repair of pumps, filters, heaters, and automation systems using the best equipment available on the market today.

cards.title: Pool Renovation & Remodeling
cards.description: Transform your backyard with new tile, plaster, energy-efficient upgrades, therapeutic spas, tanning ledges, rock grottoes, and swim-up bars.

cards.title: Spa Service & Repair
cards.description: Professional hot tub and spa maintenance, cleaning, and repair to keep your relaxation retreat in optimal working condition.

cards.title: Safety & Equipment Upgrades
cards.description: Modernize your pool with updated fixtures, plumbing, lighting, safety covers, and drainage solutions for a safer swimming environment.

cards.title: Custom Pool Features
cards.description: Add stunning decorative enhancements, repair buckled decking, and install energy-efficient systems that improve both aesthetics and functionality.

steps.title: Schedule Your Assessment
steps.description: Call or fill out our form and we'll arrange a convenient time to evaluate your pool's current condition and your goals.

steps.title: Receive Your Custom Plan
steps.description: Our certified technicians assess your pool and provide a detailed, transparent plan tailored to your pool's specific needs and your budget.

steps.title: Enjoy Crystal Clear Water
steps.description: Sit back and relax while our expert team handles everything -- keeping your pool sparkling clean and running perfectly all season long.

about.label: About Crystal Clear Custom Pools
about.headline: The Most Certified Pool Team in the DFW Metroplex
about.description: Founded in 2004, Crystal Clear Custom Pools was built to fill a real need -- a reliable, trustworthy pool service company in Ellis and Southern Dallas Counties. Owner Tom Sheehy is not just a pool professional; he's an instructor for all Pool and Hot Tub Alliance certifications and one of only two Certified Building Professional instructors in the entire state of Texas. While less than 10% of pool companies carry any certifications or insurance, we hold both -- and we believe continued education and top-quality products are what separate good pool care from great pool care.

features.title: TICL 276 Licensed & BBB Accredited
features.description: We carry every major industry certification and are fully insured -- something less than 10% of pool companies can claim.

features.title: 350+ Pools Serviced Annually
features.description: Our experienced team maintains hundreds of pools each year across 19+ cities in Dallas, Tarrant, and Ellis counties.

features.title: Featured on Pool Chasers Podcast
features.description: Owner Tom Sheehy is recognized as an industry leader and educator, sharing expertise with pool professionals nationwide.

pricing.headline: Honest Pricing, No Surprises
pricing.subtitle: Every pool is different. We provide a thorough assessment and transparent quote so you know exactly what you're paying for -- no hidden fees, no corners cut.

guarantee.headline: Our Certified Service Promise
guarantee.description: We stand behind every service call with the confidence that comes from 20+ years of experience and the highest certifications in the industry. If you're not completely satisfied with our work, we'll make it right -- because your trust is what built this company.

faqs.question: What areas do you serve?
faqs.answer: We service pools across 19+ cities including Midlothian, Waxahachie, DeSoto, Lancaster, Mansfield, Cedar Hill, Red Oak, Ennis, Grand Prairie, Duncanville, and surrounding areas in Ellis and Southern Dallas Counties.

faqs.question: What certifications does your team hold?
faqs.answer: Our team holds TICL 276 licensing and Pool and Hot Tub Alliance certifications. Owner Tom Sheehy is a CBP instructor -- one of only two in all of Texas -- and is qualified to teach every PHTA certification course.

faqs.question: How often should my pool be serviced?
faqs.answer: We recommend weekly service to maintain proper chemical balance, clean filters, and catch small issues before they become costly repairs. Our maintenance plans are designed to keep your pool swim-ready year-round.

faqs.question: Do you handle pool renovations and remodeling?
faqs.answer: Absolutely. From replacing tile and plaster to adding spas, tanning ledges, rock grottoes, swim-up bars, and energy-efficient equipment, we handle full-scale pool renovations tailored to your vision.

faqs.question: Are you licensed and insured?
faqs.answer: Yes. We are TICL 276 licensed, BBB accredited, and fully insured. Less than 10% of pool companies carry any certifications or insurance -- we carry both, giving you peace of mind with every service.

testimonials.name: George & MaryAnn S.
testimonials.text: We have used CCC Pools for over 10 years and have been extremely pleased with all services provided. Great professionalism and courtesy by all staff, with prompt service in all maintenance and needed repairs.

testimonials.name: Cyndee D.
testimonials.text: CCCPools has been taking care of my pool for nearly 5 years. They are a breath of fresh air after the previous pool service turned out to be unreliable. They go above and beyond with integrity.

testimonials.name: Jess L.
testimonials.text: Great customer service from the office to the tech's that come out. I really appreciate the knowledge they provide on keeping my pool and spa looking great and functioning correctly.

contact.headline: Ready for Crystal Clear Water?
contact.subtitle: Get in touch with our certified team today and discover why hundreds of DFW families trust us with their pools year after year.
benefits: Service across 19+ cities in Ellis & Dallas Counties

footer.description: Crystal Clear Custom Pools has provided certified pool service, repair, and renovation across Ellis and Southern Dallas Counties since 2004. Our team holds the highest certifications in the DFW area.
